Adams Wedding Photography specialises in natural, reportage-style documentary wedding photography in London. With a fly-on-the-wall approach capturing candid moments across culturally diverse ceremonies including Hindu, Punjabi, Chinese, Greek, Jewish, and Nigerian weddings.
